name: Creative Voltage
description: Saturated electric-blue canvas with neon-yellow accent and Syne / Space Mono typography. Signature: halftone dot pattern (retro-punk creative studio). Built for design weeks, creative-studio decks and visual culture talks.
descriptionZh: 饱和电光蓝底 + 霓虹黄强调 + Syne 几何衬线 / Space Mono 等宽。签名：halftone 网点纹理（复古朋克工作室感）。适合设计周、创意工作室、视觉文化话题。
bestFor: 视觉文化 / 字体话题
复古朋克 / 街头文化
